response.overview: A film class project depicting the director’s interpretation of Maya Angelou’s poem, Still I Rise (1978). Inspired by Agnès Varda and Maya Deren, the film follows stray cats navigating a vast and indifferent world—finding dignity in survival, beauty in the overlooked, and grace in simply persisting.
response.tagline: what does it mean to rise when the world was never built for you?
response.title: A World Oh So Big
